  3. Selkirk VANGUARD Power Air Invikta

Selkirk

Selkirk VANGUARD Power Air Invikta

Power-forward paddle for players who already control pop and want aggressive finishing.

Best treated as an attacking paddle: helpful for drives and speed-ups, less forgiving for players who still float resets.

TypePower
Shapeelongated / invikta
CorePerformance polymer
FaceHybrid performance face
Reference price$250.00
Price noteTypical Selkirk premium-line MSRP / collection pricing, verify current sale
Level3.5, 4.0, 4.5, 5.0
TraitsPower, Spin, Maneuverability
Used by / lineSelkirk power line
